Infection Control in Health Care Facilities 
Aug. 9, 2024 
Purpose 
This page provides guidance and resources for health professionals on infection control of influenza in health care facilities. 
Summary Documents 
Interim Guidance for Influenza Outbreak Management in Long-Term Care and Post-Acute Care Facilities 
Guidance for the Prevention and Control of Influenza in the Peri- and Postpartum Settings 
Find guidance for the prevention and control of influenza in peri- and postpartum settings. 
Interim Guidance for the Use of Masks to Control Seasonal Influenza Virus Transmission 
Learn about CDC guidance about the role of masks for controlling flu transmission.

Health care professionals play a critical role in helping patients choose flu vaccines.
